title: Refined Storage Fluxified
body: If you are tired of different power names that are all "Forge Energy" then this is the mod for you Refined Storage Fluxified is an addon for Refined Storage that visually changes Refined Storage power from Forge Energy to Redstone Flux. I've been using BisectHosting for all my server hosting needs, and I couldn't be happier. New customers can get 25% off their first month with furtabs, and their support team is always available to provide excellent assistance.
